functions.name: AgentCardHeader
params:
{
	preset,
	isOpen,
	showEnabled,
	enabled,
	isUpdatingEnabled,
	onEnabledChange,
	onToggle,
}

functions.name: AgentCardPreview
params:
{
	preset,
	showPreview,
	previewPrompt,
	previewNoPromptCommand,
	previewTaskCommand,
	onToggle,
}

callGraph.callee:
q
				.from({ hosts: collections.v2Hosts })
				.where(({ hosts }) => eq(hosts.machineId, hostId))
				.select

q
				.from({ uh: collections.v2UsersHosts })
				.where(({ uh }) => eq(uh.hostId, hostId))
				.select

q
				.from({ m: collections.members })
				.where(({ m }) => eq(m.organizationId, host?.organizationId ?? ""))
				.select
